heading: Piracy under law of nations
label: 1651 Piracy under law of nations
text: Whoever, on the high seas, commits the crime of piracy as defined by the law of nations, and is afterwards brought into or found in the United States, shall be imprisoned for life.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 481 (, ).Mar. 4, 1909, ch. 321, § 29035 Stat. 1145
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 481 (, ).Mar. 4, 1909, ch. 321, § 29035 Stat. 1145
